use_cases: Displaying confirmation dialogs with backdrop blur overlay
Form submissions or content that requires focused user attention
Alert notifications and important messages in a modal format
Multi-size modal containers for various content types
Closing modal via click outside, Escape key, or close button
ai_summary: A reusable modal component with smooth fade animations, backdrop blur effect, and click-outside/Escape key dismissal. Supports five size variants (sm, md, lg, xl, full), prevents body scroll when active, and uses theme-aware styling with CSS variables. Built with framer-motion for transitions and is fully responsive across desktop and mobile platforms.
